R0199.title: NFT Royalty Bypass
R0199.definition: Attackers bypass NFT marketplace royalty mechanisms through off-market trades or custom contracts, depriving creators of secondary sales revenue.

references.title: How NFT royalties work: Designs, challenges, and new ideas

R0199.description: Attackers bypass NFT marketplace royalty mechanisms through off-market trades or custom contracts, depriving creators of secondary sales revenue.
R0199.influence: May cause business abuse, data exposure, financial loss, compliance impact, or supply-chain propagation.
